title: 2026 Oscar Predictions: Best Picture Analysis
text: Sasha Stone predicts Sinners will win Best Picture at the 2026 Academy Awards, placing it as her top choice. She ranks One Battle After Another as her second prediction. Stone contends that Sinners, directed by Ryan Coogler, has the strongest case for victory. She notes the film received 16 nominations, more than any competitor, and performed better commercially and critically than its main rival. She emphasizes the historical significance, stating: We can do the stat, where no black director has won in 98 years of Oscar history. Stone argues that if Coogler's film cannot win under these circumstances, the entire diversity initiative implemented over the past decade becomes meaningless. Stone expresses frustration with what she views as industry groupthink, describing voters as a hive mind that simply follows consensus rather than making independent judgments. She warns of backlash if Sinners loses, predicting what she calls a Category Five Shitstorm. Despite her conviction, Stone acknowledges that not many predictors align with her choice, only Clayton Davis and Michael Grei share her forecast for Coogler to prevail.
